reasons: Proposal follows Guard A three-part structure (PreflightChecklist, ExecutionContract, RequiredChanges)
Deliverable scope limited to documentation only, no code changes
Fail-closed risk enumeration complete with mitigation measures
Rollback plan is simple and non-destructive (single file deletion)
Audit field requirements (trace_id, policy_version, decision_reason, evidence_ref) align with ISSUE-00 acceptance criteria
Does not modify files outside T01 scope
